news.title: Anthropic calls for AI research slowdown as model capabilities accelerate
news.description: Anthropic has warned about the deepening capabilities of AI and called for the world to slow down research in frontier models. The startup said that the quickening pace of AI development may make models difficult to control in the coming years.

news.title: Anthropic wants AI development to slow down globally, warns humans could lose control otherwise
news.description: In a long article on its website, titled "When AI builds itself", Anthropic said it would be good to have the option to slow or temporarily pause frontier AI development, citing safety risks and loss of control over the models as they self-improve.

news.title: Anthropic issues big AI warning, calls for slowing down development of models
news.description: Just to show the scale of how fast AI is developing itself, the company said that Anthropic engineers, on an average, are shipping 8x as much code per quarter as they did from 2021-2025
